requirement_topic.en: GOEIC Factory / Exporter Registration (Decree 43/2016) and Import Inspection
requirement_topic.zh: GOEIC工厂/出口商注册（第43/2016号法令）及进口检验
requirement_topic.zht: GOEIC工廠/出口商註冊（第43/2016號法令）及進口檢驗

summary.en: Household refrigerators are among the consumer-product categories subject to Egypt's mandatory factory/exporter registration scheme operated by GOEIC (General Organization for Export and Import Control) under Ministerial Decree 43/2016. Foreign factories that produce refrigerators for export to Egypt, or the brand owners, must be registered in the GOEIC registry before their goods can be imported; only products of registered factories may be cleared. Registration requires submission of company and factory documents (for example legal registration, trademark evidence, and a quality-system certificate such as ISO 9001), often legalised, to GOEIC. In addition to registration, each consignment undergoes GOEIC import inspection and conformity verification at the port of entry (Alexandria, Port Said, or Damietta), where documentation, marking, the energy-efficiency label, and conformity to the applicable ES standards are checked before release.
summary.zh: 家用电冰箱属于埃及由GOEIC（出口与进口控制总局）依据第43/2016号部长令实施的强制性工厂/出口商注册制度所涵盖的消费品类别之一。为向埃及出口冰箱的境外工厂或品牌所有人，须在GOEIC登记册中完成注册后其货物方可进口；仅已注册工厂的产品可获放行。注册须向GOEIC提交公司及工厂文件（例如法人注册、商标证明及如ISO 9001的质量体系证书），通常须经认证。除注册外，每批货物在入境口岸（亚历山大、塞得港或杜姆亚特）接受GOEIC进口检验与合格验证，核查文件、标识、能效标签及对适用ES标准的符合性后方予放行。
summary.zht: 家用電冰箱屬於埃及由GOEIC（出口與進口控制總局）依據第43/2016號部長令實施的強制性工廠/出口商註冊制度所涵蓋的消費品類別之一。為向埃及出口冰箱的境外工廠或品牌所有人，須在GOEIC登記冊中完成註冊後其貨物方可進口；僅已註冊工廠的產品可獲放行。註冊須向GOEIC提交公司及工廠文件（例如法人註冊、商標證明及如ISO 9001的質量體系證書），通常須經認證。除註冊外，每批貨物在入境口岸（亞歷山大、塞得港或杜姆亞特）接受GOEIC進口檢驗與合格驗證，核查文件、標識、能效標籤及對適用ES標準的符合性後方予放行。

standards_or_laws: Ministerial Decree 43/2016 — GOEIC mandatory registry for factories/exporters of specified consumer products (including refrigerators)
GOEIC import inspection and conformity verification at port of entry (Alexandria / Port Said / Damietta)
ISO 9001 quality-management certificate — commonly required as part of the GOEIC registration dossier

summary.en: China has no equivalent foreign-factory registration obligation for its own domestic market. Domestically, household refrigerators must hold China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, administered by CNCA/SAMR through designated certification bodies and factory inspections. The CCC factory inspection verifies the manufacturer's production consistency, but it is a Chinese domestic conformity-assessment process and confers no status in the Egyptian GOEIC registry. There is no Chinese-side analogue to GOEIC's exporter-registry-plus-port-inspection model for goods entering China; import control of foreign goods into China is handled separately by GACC.
summary.zh: 中国对其本国市场没有等同的境外工厂注册义务。在国内，家用电冰箱在销售前须持有涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）及EMC（GB 4343.1）的中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由CNCA/SAMR通过指定认证机构及工厂检查管理。CCC工厂检查核实制造商的生产一致性，但属中国国内合格评定流程，在埃及GOEIC登记册中不赋予任何资格。中国方面没有与GOEIC的出口商注册加口岸检验模式对应的进境制度；进入中国的境外货物的进口管制由海关总署（GACC）另行处理。
summary.zht: 中國對其本國市場沒有等同的境外工廠註冊義務。在國內，家用電冰箱在銷售前須持有涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）及EMC（GB 4343.1）的中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由CNCA/SAMR通過指定認證機構及工廠檢查管理。CCC工廠檢查核實製造商的生產一致性，但屬中國國內合格評定流程，在埃及GOEIC登記冊中不賦予任何資格。中國方面沒有與GOEIC的出口商註冊加口岸檢驗模式對應的進境制度；進入中國的境外貨物的進口管制由海關總署（GACC）另行處理。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — GB 4706.13 safety + GB 4343.1 EMC (CNCA/SAMR, domestic market)
CCC factory inspection — production-consistency verification (domestic conformity assessment, not transferable to GOEIC)

gap.en: GOEIC registration is a hard, upstream market-access gate with no Chinese equivalent: (1) The exporting factory (or brand owner) must be entered in the GOEIC registry under Decree 43/2016 BEFORE any refrigerator can be imported — an unregistered factory's goods are refused entry regardless of product quality. (2) The registration dossier (legal registration, trademark, ISO 9001, often legalised) is administrative work that takes lead time and must be in place before shipping. (3) The Chinese CCC certificate and CCC factory inspection do not count toward GOEIC registration. (4) Each consignment still faces GOEIC port inspection where the ES-standard conformity, marking, and energy label are verified. Exporters should start GOEIC registration well ahead of the first shipment and ensure their Egyptian importer is aligned with the registry status.
gap.zh: GOEIC注册是无中国对应制度的硬性上游市场准入门槛：（1）出口工厂（或品牌所有人）须在任何冰箱进口前依据第43/2016号法令进入GOEIC登记册——未注册工厂的货物无论产品质量如何均被拒绝入境。（2）注册档案（法人注册、商标、ISO 9001，通常须认证）属需要提前期的行政工作，须在出货前就绪。（3）中国CCC证书及CCC工厂检查不计入GOEIC注册。（4）每批货物仍须经GOEIC口岸检验，核查ES标准符合性、标识及能效标签。出口商应在首批出货前充分提前启动GOEIC注册，并确保埃及进口商与注册状态相一致。
gap.zht: GOEIC註冊是無中國對應制度的硬性上游市場准入門檻：（1）出口工廠（或品牌所有人）須在任何冰箱進口前依據第43/2016號法令進入GOEIC登記册——未註冊工廠的貨物無論產品質量如何均被拒絕入境。（2）註冊檔案（法人註冊、商標、ISO 9001，通常須認證）屬需要提前期的行政工作，須在出貨前就緒。（3）中國CCC證書及CCC工廠檢查不計入GOEIC註冊。（4）每批貨物仍須經GOEIC口岸檢驗，核查ES標準符合性、標識及能效標籤。出口商應在首批出貨前充分提前啟動GOEIC註冊，並確保埃及進口商與註冊狀態相一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GOEIC factory/exporter registration under Decree 43/2016 is a precondition for importing refrigerators into Egypt; per-consignment GOEIC import inspection also mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable as an export-registry obligation — China requires domestic CCC (GB 4706.13 + GB 4343.1) for sale in China; no equivalent foreign-factory registry

source.publisher: General Organization for Export and Import Control (GOEIC), Egypt

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GOEIC registration under Decree 43/2016 is a mandatory pre-shipment gate: goods from an unregistered factory cannot be imported into Egypt. Chinese CCC status does not count toward it. Begin registration early and budget lead time for the legalised dossier, then expect per-consignment GOEIC port inspection.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据第43/2016号法令的GOEIC注册是强制性出货前门槛：未注册工厂的货物不能进口至埃及。中国CCC资格不计入其中。应尽早启动注册并为认证档案预留提前期，随后预期每批货物的GOEIC口岸检验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據第43/2016號法令的GOEIC註冊是強制性出貨前門檻：未註冊工廠的貨物不能進口至埃及。中國CCC資格不計入其中。應盡早啟動註冊並為認證檔案預留提前期，隨後預期每批貨物的GOEIC口岸檢驗。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Egyptian Importer of Record and ES IEC 60335-2-24 Conformity Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 埃及本地进口记录商及ES IEC 60335-2-24合格接受
requirement_topic.zht: 埃及本地進口記錄商及ES IEC 60335-2-24合格接受

summary.en: Refrigerators cannot be self-imported by a foreign manufacturer; an in-country Egyptian importer of record (a locally registered company on the importers' register) must bring the goods in, hold the import documentation, and be the responsible party for customs, GOEIC inspection, and post-market obligations. For conformity, EOS supervises product compliance and accepts product conformity demonstrated against the ES standard adopting IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-24 (safety of household refrigerating appliances). The importer must ensure the consignment file presents acceptable conformity evidence, the Arabic energy-efficiency label, and the required marking before the goods reach Alexandria, Port Said, or Damietta. The product is rated for a 220 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 冰箱不能由境外制造商自行进口；须由埃及本地进口记录商（在进口商登记册上的本地注册公司）进口货物、持有进口文件，并作为海关、GOEIC检验及上市后义务的责任方。在合格方面，EOS监管产品合规，接受针对采用IEC 60335-1及IEC 60335-2-24（家用制冷器具安全）的ES标准所证明的产品合格。进口商须确保货物档案在货物抵达亚历山大、塞得港或杜姆亚特前呈交可接受的合格证据、阿拉伯文能效标签及所需标识。产品按220 V、50 Hz供电额定。
summary.zht: 冰箱不能由境外製造商自行進口；須由埃及本地進口記錄商（在進口商登記冊上的本地註冊公司）進口貨物、持有進口文件，並作為海關、GOEIC檢驗及上市後義務的責任方。在合格方面，EOS監管產品合規，接受針對採用IEC 60335-1及IEC 60335-2-24（家用製冷器具安全）的ES標準所證明的產品合格。進口商須確保貨物檔案在貨物抵達亞歷山大、塞得港或杜姆亞特前呈交可接受的合格證據、阿拉伯文能效標籤及所需標識。產品按220 V、50 Hz供電額定。

standards_or_laws: Egyptian importers' register — in-country importer of record required for clearance (Egyptian customs / GOEIC)
ES standards adopting IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-24 — safety of household refrigerating appliances (EOS conformity basis)
GOEIC import-inspection conformity verification at port of entry

summary.en: For the Chinese domestic market there is no importer-of-record concept for a domestically made refrigerator; the Chinese manufacturer places product directly under its CCC certification. Safety is demonstrated against GB 4706.1 (general requirements) and GB 4706.13 (particular requirements for refrigerating appliances), which are the Chinese adoptions of IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-24. Although the technical base standard is the same IEC text, the GB version, the CCC certificate, and the Chinese factory inspection are domestic instruments and are not, by themselves, accepted as Egyptian conformity evidence. Where goods are exported, the responsible party in Egypt is the local importer, not the Chinese maker.
summary.zh: 对于中国国内市场，本国制造的冰箱不存在进口记录商概念；中国制造商凭其CCC认证直接投放产品。安全依据GB 4706.1（通用要求）及GB 4706.13（制冷器具特殊要求）证明，二者为IEC 60335-1及IEC 60335-2-24的中国采标版本。尽管技术基础标准为相同IEC文本，但GB版本、CCC证书及中国工厂检查均为国内工具，其本身不被接受为埃及合格证据。货物出口时，埃及的责任方为本地进口商，而非中国制造商。
summary.zht: 對於中國國內市場，本國製造的冰箱不存在進口記錄商概念；中國製造商憑其CCC認證直接投放產品。安全依據GB 4706.1（通用要求）及GB 4706.13（製冷器具特殊要求）證明，二者為IEC 60335-1及IEC 60335-2-24的中國採標版本。儘管技術基礎標準為相同IEC文本，但GB版本、CCC證書及中國工廠檢查均為國內工具，其本身不被接受為埃及合格證據。貨物出口時，埃及的責任方為本地進口商，而非中國製造商。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — General requirements (adoption of IEC 60335-1)
GB 4706.13 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (adoption of IEC 60335-2-24; CCC mandatory)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — domestic conformity, not transferable to Egypt

gap.en: Two structural gaps: (1) Importer of record — a foreign Chinese manufacturer cannot clear refrigerators into Egypt on its own; it must appoint or sell through a locally registered Egyptian importer who holds the import documentation and carries customs, GOEIC, and post-market responsibility. (2) Conformity acceptance — although GB 4706.13 and ES IEC 60335-2-24 share the IEC 60335-2-24 base, the Chinese CCC certificate is not itself accepted; EOS requires conformity demonstrated to the ES-adopted standard, typically via a test report from an accepted laboratory and supporting documentation in the consignment file. Exporters should line up the Egyptian importer early and confirm with EOS which IEC 60335-2-24 report and which conformity route are accepted, then ensure the Arabic label and marking are applied before the goods reach the port.
gap.zh: 两项结构性差距：（1）进口记录商——境外中国制造商不能自行将冰箱清关进入埃及；须委任本地注册的埃及进口商或经其销售，由该进口商持有进口文件并承担海关、GOEIC及上市后责任。（2）合格接受——尽管GB 4706.13与ES IEC 60335-2-24共享IEC 60335-2-24基础，中国CCC证书本身不被接受；EOS要求按ES采标标准证明合格，通常须由接受的实验室出具检测报告并在货物档案中附支持文件。出口商应尽早安排埃及进口商，并向EOS确认接受的IEC 60335-2-24报告及合格路径，随后确保在货物抵港前贴附阿拉伯文标签及标识。
gap.zht: 兩項結構性差距：（1）進口記錄商——境外中國製造商不能自行將冰箱清關進入埃及；須委任本地註冊的埃及進口商或經其銷售，由該進口商持有進口文件並承擔海關、GOEIC及上市後責任。（2）合格接受——儘管GB 4706.13與ES IEC 60335-2-24共享IEC 60335-2-24基礎，中國CCC證書本身不被接受；EOS要求按ES採標標準證明合格，通常須由接受的實驗室出具檢測報告並在貨物檔案中附支持文件。出口商應盡早安排埃及進口商，並向EOS確認接受的IEC 60335-2-24報告及合格路徑，隨後確保在貨物抵港前貼附阿拉伯文標籤及標識。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — an in-country Egyptian importer of record is required for clearance, and conformity to ES IEC 60335-2-24 must be demonstrated and accepted by EOS; verified at GOEIC import inspection
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (domestic) — GB 4706.13 safety and CCC required before sale in China; no importer-of-record concept for domestic goods

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egypt requires an in-country importer of record and EOS-accepted conformity to ES IEC 60335-2-24; the Chinese CCC certificate alone is not accepted even though it shares the IEC 60335-2-24 base. Appoint the Egyptian importer early and confirm the accepted IEC 60335-2-24 report and conformity route with EOS before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及要求本地进口记录商及EOS接受的ES IEC 60335-2-24合格；即便共享IEC 60335-2-24基础，中国CCC证书本身也不被接受。应尽早委任埃及进口商，并在出货前向EOS确认接受的IEC 60335-2-24报告及合格路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及要求本地進口記錄商及EOS接受的ES IEC 60335-2-24合格；即便共享IEC 60335-2-24基礎，中國CCC證書本身也不被接受。應盡早委任埃及進口商，並在出貨前向EOS確認接受的IEC 60335-2-24報告及合格路徑。
